inline_comments.message:
Your subject / body and the content of the change to do not match. You're adding not just a verify job but the full project definition for vfc-gvnfm-vnfmgr along with a merge job

Be more clear in your commit message, see [0]. Your commit message subject should give a good indication of what is happening. The commit message body should give a clear reason as to why it is happening.

[0] http://chris.beams.io/posts/git-commit
